# MDE v1.2.17

## Features

- None.

## Bug Fixes

- Fixed Codex-backed Summary and Translate failures caused by the removed `--ask-for-approval` Codex CLI flag.
- Updated the Codex execution arguments to keep the read-only sandbox and stdin prompt flow without passing unsupported approval flags.

## Breaking Changes

- None.

## Maintenance

- Added unit coverage that runs fake Codex executables through the real spawn path for both Summary and Translate and verifies removed approval flags are not passed.
- Added IPC integration coverage that runs Codex through the default AI service path and verifies the same argument compatibility.
- Strengthened the desktop AI E2E flow so its fake Codex executable fails if unsupported approval flags are passed.
- Updated `package.json` and `package-lock.json` to version `1.2.17`.

## Verification

- `npm run lint`
- `npm run typecheck`
- `npm run test:unit`
- `npm run test:integration`
- `npm run test:e2e -- tests/e2e/markdown-editor.e2e.test.ts -g "summarizes and translates"`
- `npm run test:e2e`

## Artifacts

- macOS DMG and ZIP for Apple Silicon and Intel.
- Windows NSIS installer for x64.
